fields.name: originDestinationId
fields.description: Id of the originDestination in query

fields.name: instantTicketingRequired
fields.description: If true, inform that a ticketing will be required at booking step.

fields.name: paymentCardRequired
fields.description: If true, a payment card is mandatory to book this flight offer

fields.name: duration
fields.description: duration in [ISO8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) PnYnMnDTnHnMnS format, e.g. PT2H10M for a duration of 2h10m
